scripts.build: npm run build -w @mag/shared && npm run build -w @mag/api && npm run build -w @mag/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mag/shared && npm run test -w @mag/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @mag/api && npm run lint -w @mag/web
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify:source && npm run verify:phase3 && npm run build && npm test
